sections.heading: Page 1
paragraphs:
GovSecure | 3rd-Party AI Vendor Risk Review
GOVSECURE | GOVERNANCE WORKFLOW AND ADD-ON TOOL
3rd-Party AI Vendor Risk Review
Structured due diligence and decision workbook for reviewing AI vendors, copilots,
embedded AI features, and AI-enabled SaaS before approval.
Prepared For {{COMPANY_NAME}}
Version / Effective Date v1.0 | {{EFFECTIVE_DATE}}
Pre-procurement, renewal, major feature
Primary Use
enablement, or control revalidation
Purpose Use this workbook to evaluate third-party AI products and AI-enabled vendor
features with a standard, defensible review method. It is built for SMBs that buy AI more
often than they build it, and need practical evidence before saying yes.
This workbook should be retained as the internal review record. The decision summary page can be
shared with procurement, leadership, security, legal, or business owners as needed.
1. Review Overview
This review is designed to answer a simple question: can this vendor be trusted to support the
intended AI use case at an acceptable level of risk? It gives the organization a repeatable
structure for assessing security, privacy, legal, operational, and AI-specific concerns before
approval.
What it does Primary user Output produced Best use case
New AI procurement,
Captures vendor facts, AI governance lead, A documented risk
contract renewal,
risks, evidence, and a security, privacy, review, remediation
embedded AI feature
final decision in one legal, procurement, or list, and approval
activation, or control
review record. business owner. decision.
refresh.
2. Standard Decision Outcomes
• Approve - vendor is acceptable for the reviewed use case under normal operating controls.
GovSecure • Confidential • Page 1

5. Required Evidence Request
• Security or trust documentation (for example SOC 2, ISO 27001, penetration summary, or
equivalent assurance).
• Privacy or data processing terms, including DPA, subprocessors, retention terms, and geographic
processing information.
• Product architecture or security overview showing where data is stored, processed, and
connected.
GovSecure • Confidential • Page 3

sections.heading: Page 4
paragraphs:
GovSecure | 3rd-Party AI Vendor Risk Review
• AI-specific documentation covering model use, training on customer data, controls,
explainability, and limitations.
• Standard contract, MSA, order form, and any AI-specific terms or feature annexes.
• Incident response, business continuity, and support commitments where relevant.
Escalation trigger If the vendor refuses to answer basic data handling questions, will not
explain training use of customer data, or provides security language that sounds like a
horoscope, escalate before anything gets signed.
6. Detailed Review Domains
Use the following worksheets to record the vendor response, evidence received, and reviewer
position for each control area. Suggested ratings: Acceptable, Needs Follow-up, or Material
Concern.
